title: No Dirt Warfare!
description: Disables PvP for players who haven't set their spawn.
body:
What is [Dirt Warfare?](https://wiki.cflip.net/Dirt_Warfare)

 

This mod prevents players which do not possess a bed to instigate combat with other players. This can be useful in PvP situations where a player lost all of their items and respawn point but continues attacking other players. In order to attack other players, a respawn point away from default worldspawn must be set. If you destroy someone's bed, they must be slain in order for their PvP to be disabled. (Essentially a New Life Rule for your PvP Minecraft servers!)
